channel.title: 2026-06-06 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-06-06 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: 通过 CALPHAD 信息引导的机器学习与数据增强加速相预测
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作围绕材料相预测中的效率与准确性问题，结合 CALPHAD 热力学知识、机器学习方法和数据增强策略开展研究。题名表明其目标是利用物理或热力学先验提升数据驱动模型在合金或材料体系相稳定性预测中的表现。由于所给摘要主要为出版元数据，具体模型、数据集和性能结果需查阅原文。

item.title: Machine Learning Accelerated Computational Design of Bio‐Inspired Catalysts in the Nitrogen Reduction Reaction
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Leonardo Di Ciano, Zihan You, Haoran Chen, Qifan Zhong, Rong‐Zhen Liao, Shaoqi Zhan
Advanced Materials, EarlyView.

item.title: 一类具有反铁磁和铁磁有序及巨大磁各向异性的二维钨—第 13 族单层材料
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究关注由钨与第 13 族元素构成的新型二维单层材料，并探讨其磁有序和磁各向异性特征。题名显示，这一材料家族可能同时包含反铁磁和铁磁基态，并表现出显著的磁各向异性，因而与二维磁性材料和自旋电子学应用相关。由于所给内容仅含出版信息和作者列表，具体计算方法、稳定性分析及磁性参数需查阅原文。

item.title: Al³⁺/Sn⁴⁺/Cu²⁺ 三元掺杂调控 BaM 六角铁氧体的磁性与介电性能
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作研究 Al³⁺、Sn⁴⁺ 和 Cu²⁺ 三元掺杂对 BaM 型六角铁氧体磁学与介电性质的调控作用。题名表明研究重点在于通过多离子取代改变铁氧体的结构、磁响应和介电行为，以服务于高频、电磁吸收或磁介质相关应用。由于所给摘要仅为出版元数据，具体样品组成、实验结果和机理解释需查阅原文。

item.title: Entropy‐Driven Polarization Disordering Enables Ultrahigh Energy Storage Performance in Lead‐Free Ferroelectric Ceramics
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yule Yang, Leiyang Zhang, Yunyao Huang, Wenjing Shi, Fukang Chen, Xinru Nie, Ruiyi Jing, Li Jin
Advanced Functional Materials, EarlyView.

item.title: Reduced‐Reflectance Bionic E‐Skin with Electromagnetic–Environmental–Sensing Integration Enabled by Ni‐Reconstructed Liquid Metal Networks
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Zhen Liu, Yanhui Xue, Yuntong Meng, Jiaen Wang, Hao Zhang, Fujun Zhang, Fanbin Meng, Biao Zhao, Luting Yan, Benliang Liang
Advanced Functional Materials, EarlyView.

item.title: Scientists identify the origin of noise in spin qubit quantum processors
item.description:
📚 Physics News
A spin qubit, in which quantum information is encoded in the spin state of an electron, is one of the most promising platforms for quantum computing. Spin qubits exhibit long coherence times and are compatible with advanced semiconductor manufacturing technologies. The leading implementation of spin qubits involves confined electrons inside quantum dots, a nanoscale semiconductor architecture that behaves like a controllable artificial atom. Recent advances have enabled high-fidelity operation of single- and two-qubit gates, exceeding the threshold required for certain surface code quantum error correction techniques.

item.title: [ASAP] Faster Molecular Dynamics with Neural Network Potentials via Distilled Multiple Time-Stepping and Nonconservative Forces
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Nicolaï Gouraud, Côme Cattin, Thomas Plé, Olivier Adjoua, Louis Lagardère, and Jean-Philip Piquemal
Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.6c00653

item.title: Quantum Chemical Evidence for Localized O1–C5=C4 Reactivity in 2,3-Dihydrofuran
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Khakendra Basnet, Jeevan Ghimire, Bhijan Neupane
2,3-Dihydrofuran is a small oxygen-containing heterocycle whose enol-ether unit makes it useful in synthesis, oxidation chemistry, and polymer-related transformations; however, its global electronic stability and local reactive behavior are not always clearly distinguished. Density functional theory calculations were performed at the B3LYP/6-311 + + G(d,p) level to examine the geometry, frontier orbitals, global reactivity descriptors, local reactivity indices, electrostatic potential, donor–acceptor interactions, weak contacts, and electron localization features of 2,3-dihydrofuran. The optimized neutral structure showed a slightly puckered five-membered ring, indicating the partial release of ring strain while preserving the electronically active O1–C5 = C4 enol-ether fragment. The gas-…

item.title: [ASAP] Reductant-Activated Indium Phosphide Magic-Sized Clusters for Dual-Path Synthesis of Bright Blue Emitters and Narrow-Band Quantum Dots

item.title: Controlled Engineering of 2D Alkali‐Iron‐Chloride Compounds and Lateral Quantum Heterostructures Within Confined Graphene Nanoreactors

item.title: Thermal quench dynamics of visons in gapless Kitaev spin liquid
item.description:
📚 npj Quantum Materials
👤 Yang Yang, Gia-Wei Chern
npj Quantum Materials, Published online: 06 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41535-026-00908-1 Thermal quench dynamics of visons in gapless Kitaev spin liquid
